behavior_summary: This item behaves as a stepping-stone tile: when examined (U8P_SINKING::look) it shows a short description ('stepping stone').

When the player/avatar enters the item's fast-area trigger (U8P_SINKING::enterFastArea) it begins a staged sinking/animation sequence (U8P_SINKING::func0114) that: computes delays from the item's quality, plays sound effects, records the current frame, and runs three helper stages (U8P_SINKING::func01D6, U8P_SINKING::func04D3, U8P_SINKING::func0341).

Stage helpers manipulate the item's in-world type and frame (Item::setType, Item::setFrame), temporarily push nearby/stacked items (Item::push), and pop them back at altered Z to simulate vertical motion; they use spawn/suspend (FREE::func1C19) to pace the animation and inner loops bounded by a small iteration limit.

Leaving the fast-area (U8P_SINKING::leaveFastArea) cancels/cleans up the animation state by resetting the item's type to a fallback (0x020F) and clearing a stored/free reference (FREE::resetRef), preventing the sequence from continuing off-screen.
A U8P_SINKING::release utility (U8P_SINKING::release) checks Item::getSurfaceWeight and, if zero, calls AccumulateDexterity(0x0F) — a small player stat award.
notable_control_flow: U8P_SINKING::enterFastArea immediately calls U8P_SINKING::func0114 to start the timed/staged animation.

U8P_SINKING::func0114 computes an initial spawn delay from Item::getQuality(this) * 3 via FREE::func1C19, then alternates calls to stage helpers with explicit spawn/suspend pauses (fixed delays like 0x01F4, 0x00C8 and the quality-based delay).

Stage helpers (U8P_SINKING::func01D6 and U8P_SINKING::func0341) run bounded internal loops (local3 from 1 to 0x0F) where each iteration pushes this item and nearby items, adjusts frames, pops items at Z+1 or Z-1 and suspends to animate progression.

U8P_SINKING::func04D3 collects eligible nearby items (skips specific types), switches this item to a restore type/frame (0x015B/0x10), then iteratively pops and causes collected items to fall to finalize stack restoration.
U8P_SINKING::leaveFastArea forcibly resets type and clears FREE reference, acting as a cleanup/abort for the staged animation.
open_questions: Exact semantic meaning of numeric type IDs (0x79, 0x020F, 0x015B) in game content — inferred as visual/state variants but not concretely identified.
Precise behavior and callback semantics of FREE::func1C19 (spawn parameter effects and what process it resumes) — used as a delayed spawn but exact return/pid semantics are inferred.
Who receives AccumulateDexterity (player vs. actor) when U8P_SINKING::release awards dexterity and under what gameplay conditions that path is triggered in normal play.
Behavior if the avatar leaves the fast-area mid-sequence: whether spawned timers persist or are cancelled by FREE::resetRef beyond the immediate setType call.

main_function.name: U8P_SINKING::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the item's short description when the player examines it and then yield/end the U8P_SINKING::look process.
entry_conditions: Triggered when the player uses the 'U8P_SINKING::look' / examine action on this item.

function_map.name: U8P_SINKING::look
function_map.role: examine/U8P_SINKING::look handler that displays a short bark ('stepping stone')

function_map.name: U8P_SINKING::enterFastArea
function_map.role: trigger entry point that starts the sinking/animation by calling U8P_SINKING::func0114

function_map.name: U8P_SINKING::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: cleanup/abort handler: resets item type to fallback and clears the stored/free reference (FREE::resetRef)

function_map.name: U8P_SINKING::release
function_map.role: utility to 'U8P_SINKING::release' the item; conditionally awards dexterity when surface weight == 0

function_map.name: U8P_SINKING::func0114
function_map.role: central orchestrator of the staged sinking animation (timing, SFX, record frame, call stage helpers)

function_map.name: U8P_SINKING::func01D6
function_map.role: early-stage animator: set type 0x79, set frame by boolean param, push/pop this and nearby items, small vertical shifts and a spawn/suspend step

function_map.name: U8P_SINKING::func0341
function_map.role: later-stage animator: similar push/pop loop with different frames/offsets, final setType to 0x020F and large negative Z pop to sink

function_map.name: U8P_SINKING::func04D3
function_map.role: collect-and-restore helper: gathers nearby items (skipping specific types), changes this item to 0x015B/0x10 and then pops/makes collected items fall

internal_calls.purpose: Start the sinking/animation sequence on fast-area entry
Perform the first/early animation stage (frame/type change and push/pop)
Perform middle stage to collect/restore nearby items
Perform final/later animation stage including deep sink/pop

external_calls.purpose: Spawn/schedule timed delays used to pace the animation (called with quality-derived and fixed values)
Play sound effects at stage boundaries
Clear the stored/free reference for this item as part of cleanup
Change the item's in-world type to 0x79 for the animation stage
Set types (0x79 then later 0x020F) to reflect animation and final sunk state
Temporarily remove and re-add items at adjusted coordinates to simulate vertical motion
Inspect nearby items and skip types 0x015B, 0x01DC, 0x0269 when collecting
Determine if the surface weight is zero before awarding dexterity
Retrieve pushed/ethereal items so they can be popped back in order

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This item behaves as a stepping-stone tile: when examined (U8P_SINKING::look) it shows a short description ('stepping stone').
